method6d.title: 6D Navigation System
method6d.subtitle: Six Vectors of Health
method6d.description: Individual recovery roadmap for each patient.

1.quote: Twelve doctors in eight years. Each one treated a piece. None saw the pattern. Dr. Erkin found HPA-axis exhaustion in the first session. Six months later, I'm back to living.

2.quote: Two burnouts. Antidepressants stopped working. The 6D assessment revealed what no one checked — cellular energy collapse. Three months later, I'm running my company again.

3.quote: Rheumatologist — nothing. Neurologist — nothing. Gastroenterologist — nothing. Dr. Erkin connected dots no one else saw. Finally, a diagnosis that makes sense.

4.quote: Brain fog, fatigue, heart palpitations — doctors told me to wait. The 6D protocol addressed autonomic dysfunction directly. I got my brain back.

5.quote: I spent €40,000 on treatments that didn't work. €100 diagnostic showed what everyone missed: my pain wasn't psychological — it was neuroinflammation.

6.quote: TSH perfect. Couldn't get out of bed. Dr. Erkin explained T4-to-T3 conversion at cellular level. No other doctor mentioned this. Now I understand my body.

7.quote: Six years of diets, pills, examinations. Dr. Erkin found the gut-brain connection no one was looking for. Four months later, I eat normally.

8.quote: Ten years of migraines. MRI clear, pills don't help. 6D analysis revealed cervical dysfunction and dietary triggers. Finally living without fear of pain.

items.question: Why do I feel exhausted even after a full night's sleep?
items.answer: This type of fatigue often stems from mitochondrial dysfunction or a state of 'cellular hibernation' rather than simple lack of rest. Our 6D Diagnostic Navigation helps identify if the root cause lies in metabolic or neurological regulation.

items.question: Why are my lab results 'normal' if I feel so unwell?
items.answer: Standard lab tests are designed to find acute pathology, often missing sub-clinical functional imbalances like HPA-axis dysfunction. We look beyond the 'reference range' to find the physiological logic behind your symptoms.

items.question: What is HPA axis dysfunction and how does it affect energy?
items.answer: The HPA axis (hypothalamus-pituitary-adrenal) is the main stress regulator. Its dysfunction leads to feeling 'tired but wired', brain fog, and sleep disturbances. Restoring this axis is a priority in treating exhaustion.

items.question: Why doesn't vacation help with professional burnout?
items.answer: Burnout is physiological exhaustion of the body's resources at the cellular level, not just psychological fatigue. A short rest cannot instantly restore neuroendocrine balance.

items.question: How does 6D diagnostics help with chronic pain?
items.answer: We look for systemic causes: neuroinflammation, biochemical deficits, or errors in movement patterns. Breaking the pain cycle is only possible through comprehensive action on all health vectors.

items.question: Can Long COVID symptoms go away on their own?
items.answer: In many patients, the body gets stuck in autonomic dysfunction mode. Without targeted regulation of the autonomic nervous system, symptoms can persist for months or years.

items.question: How does an online consultation work for complex cases?
items.answer: The session lasts 60 minutes. I study your medical history in advance so that during the meeting I can focus on finding connections between symptoms and create a navigation map for your recovery.

items.question: What will I receive after the diagnostic session?
items.answer: You will receive a clear understanding of the root causes of your condition and an individual action plan (roadmap) including lifestyle corrections, nutrition, and recommendations for further therapy.
